summaryTemplate: {{className}} is the {{patternRole}}. It exposes traversal through operator++/operator* so callers walk a collection without seeing its internal storage. Pattern body lives at {{file}}:{{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}.
chosenRationaleTemplate: Tagged as Iterator because {{className}} overloads the canonical traversal operators (lines {{lineStart}}-{{lineEnd}}) — operator++ to advance and operator* to read the current element.

iterator_advance_or_deref.note: The advance/dereference operator. Overloading these is what lets the type drop into range-for and standard algorithms transparently.

runnerUpComparisonTemplates.Composite: Composite models part-whole trees; an Iterator may walk one, but the Iterator's own job is sequential access via operator++/operator*, independent of the structure it traverses.
